description: Read contractor-persona.md. Generic SMB description, no evidence, no behavioral patterns. Rubric score 2/10.
Sharpened segment: 'independent GC, 2-10 employees, $200k-$1M revenue, residential remodels'. Rubric: specific segment +1. Score 3/10.
Added 3 named pain points with citations from interview notes: chasing invoice payments, scheduling subs last-minute, job cost tracking. Score 5/10.
Added behavioral patterns section: whiteboard for scheduling, Excel for job costing, texting subs for updates. Score 7/10.
Added direct quote from interview #7: 'I spend 2 hours every Friday just chasing payments'. Score 8/10. GOAL MET.
